title: Deployment Strategist (Europe / UK)
must_haves: Experience working with customers in a technical capacity (student clubs / side projects accepted)
Basic proficiency in Python + understanding of API integration for prototyping/demos
Excellent communication; summarise complex technical concepts
Track record owning complex projects and delivering results
Technical aptitude to understand voice/audio AI models
met_strengths: Strong project ownership and customer/community-facing track record
Agentic-AI builder (Claude Code) — strong technical-aptitude signal
Explicitly low bar on customer-technical experience and only 'basic' Python
UK-based; UK is an eligible location for this Europe role
one_line_verdict: Genuinely accessible vs other Deployment Strategist roles — only 'basic Python' and lenient customer-technical bar — but the Python/API-prototyping expectation and enterprise voice-AI deal ownership make it a fair stretch for a non-coding operator.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby API (job-board/elevenlabs). UK-eligible variant is 'Deployment Strategist - Europe' (United Kingdom); standalone London slug returned 404 on WebFetch. Requirements (basic Python, API integration, customer-facing) pulled from listing.
